title: A cooktop comprising a knob with a light source
abstract: The present invention relates to a cooktop (1) comprising a burner plate (2); a plurality of burner groups (3) that produce flames with the burning of flammable gases and that enable the flame to reach and heat the cooking vessel wherein the cooking occurs; at least one grate (4) that is placed on the burner plate (2) so as to surround the burner group (3), and a plurality of knobs (5) that are disposed on the burner plate (2), that are used to adjust the cooking temperature by being rotated, each knob (5) corresponding to a burner group (3).
claims: Claims ( 7 ) A cooktop (1) comprising a burner plate (2); a plurality of burner groups (3) that produce flames with the burning of flammable gases and that enable the flame to reach and heat the cooking vessel wherein the cooking occurs; at least one grate (4) that is placed on the burner plate (2) so as to surround the burner group (3), and a plurality of knobs (5) that are disposed on the burner plate (2), that are used to adjust the cooking temperature by being rotated, each knob (5) corresponding to a burner group (3), characterized by -	a light source (6) that is disposed on each knob (5), -	a switch (7) that is disposed at the base of the burner plate (2) and that provides the transmission of electrical energy to the light source (6), -	a plurality of arms (8) with one end extending to the burner group (3) and the other to the switch (7), that are movably disposed on the grate (4). A cooktop (1) as in Claim 1, characterized by the arm (8) that is disposed so as to rotate around the axis where the latter is connected to the grate (4) by means of a joint (9). A cooktop (1) as in Claim 1 or 2, characterized by the L-shaped arm (8). A cooktop (1) as in any one of the Claims 1 to 3, characterized by at least one protrusion (10) arranged on the arm (8). A cooktop (1) as in any one of the above claims, characterized by at least one abutment (11) arranged on the arm (8). A cooktop (1) as in any one of the above claims, characterized by at least one housing (12) arranged on the knob (5) and by the light source (6) placed into the housing (12). A cooktop (1) as in any one of the above claims, characterized by the light source (6) which is a LED.
